a:T18c1,<div class="specification">
<p>A calculator generates a random sequence of digits. A sample of 200 digits is randomly selected from the first 100 000 digits of the sequence. The following table gives the number of times each digit occurs in this sample.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"/></p>
<p>It is claimed that all digits have the same probability of appearing in the sequence.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Test this claim at the 5% level of significance.</p>
<div class="marks">[7]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain what is meant by the 5% level of significance.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:T941,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>H<sub>0</sub>: The sequence contains equal numbers of each digit.       <em><strong>(A1) </strong></em></p>
<p>H<sub>1</sub>: The sequence does not contain equal numbers of each digit.      <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\chi _{{\text{calc}}}^2 = \frac{{\left( {9 + 1 + 25 + 1 + 25 + 49 + 1 + 9 + 4 + 16} \right)}}{{20}} = 7" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"> <msubsup> <mi>χ</mi> <mrow> <mrow> <mtext>calc</mtext> </mrow> </mrow> <mn>2</mn> </msubsup> <mo>=</mo> <mfrac> <mrow> <mrow> <mo>(</mo> <mrow> <mn>9</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>1</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>25</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>1</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>25</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>49</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>1</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>9</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>4</mn> <mo>+</mo> <mn>16</mn> </mrow> <mo>)</mo> </mrow> </mrow> <mrow> <mn>20</mn> </mrow> </mfrac> <mo>=</mo> <mn>7</mn> </math></span>       <em><strong>(M1)(A1)</strong></em></p>
<p>The number of degrees of freedom is 9.        <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\chi _{0.95{\text{;}}\,\,5}^2 = 16.919" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"> <msubsup> <mi>χ</mi> <mrow> <mn>0.95</mn> <mrow> <mtext>;</mtext> </mrow> <mspace width="thinmathspace"></mspace> <mspace width="thinmathspace"></mspace> <mn>5</mn> </mrow> <mn>2</mn> </msubsup> <mo>=</mo> <mn>16.919</mn> </math></span>        <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em></p>
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\chi _{{\text{calc}}}^2 &lt; 16.919" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"> <msubsup> <mi>χ</mi> <mrow> <mrow> <mtext>calc</mtext> </mrow> </mrow> <mn>2</mn> </msubsup> <mo>&lt;</mo> <mn>16.919</mn> </math></span>. Hence H<sub>0</sub> is accepted.        <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[7 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The probability of rejecting H<sub>0</sub> when it is true         <em><strong> (A1)</strong></em></p>
<p>is 0.05.         <em><strong> (A1)</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>Note:</strong>  </em>Award <em><strong>(A1)(A1)</strong></em> for “the probability of a type I error is 0.05.”</p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/maths/topic/4/","children":["← back to ","Mathematics"," topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"EXM.1.SL.TZ0.11"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Mathematics"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"EXM"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-11-expected-observed-hypotheses-chi-squared-gof-t-test"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
